title: laurus subscandens
intro: Laurus subscandens, also known as the golden laurel, is a plant species that belongs to the laurel family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Laurus subscandens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are used to promote overall health and well-being.
